overview: Trivida is a Denver-based functional medicine clinic that uses in-depth laboratory testing to identify and address root causes of chronic health issues including thyroid problems, GI issues, and hormonal imbalances. They build personalized treatment plans addressing nutrition, hormones, stress, and exercise.
highlights: Focus on thyroid, GI, and hormonal issues
targetAudience: Individuals with chronic health conditions seeking personalized, root-cause treatment approaches.
